title: Oma's French Meringue Cookies
ingredients: 2 tsp. vanilla extract or vanilla extract powder
1 ½ cup granulated sugar (Baker's fine sugar is best)
1 10-12 oz. container of mini semisweet chocolate chips
instructions: Line baking sheets with parchment paper.
Add cream of tartar, salt, and vanilla to egg whites and whip until stiff peaks just begin to form.
Slowly add the sugar and whip thoroughly until mixture is very light with stiff peaks.
Drop dough by teaspoons or pipe onto prepared baking sheets to form small cookies.
Bake at 300 degrees for approximately 25 minutes, moving sheets' rack location if needed to prevent browning.
Before removing from oven, verify meringues have cooked enough to hold together if lifted off baking pan.
notes: Baker's fine sugar is best for this recipe
Meringues should not brown during baking
Do not cover with plastic wrap or store in closed container after cooling, as they will turn gummy
High humidity may affect how well the meringues turn out
